summary: ISS-2187 (raw-text/monitor.py absent from curmudgeon-clone, c6 cycle) is OBE. Direct fetch of monitor.py from dome author's GitHub (HTTP 200) confirms Domain 16 hardcoding claim: predicted=11.7, observed=11.7, static constants, pass=True, source='IRIS / Geometrics MT data (WIN-008 static win)'. No patch to wins.json needed — the code_analysis claims in WIN-008 and WIN-009 are correct. The pipeline gap (poller not committing monitor.py to raw-text/) is real and remains assigned to tinker for a separate fix. No scientific claim changes required.
action_for_decider: Close ISS-2187 as OBE. The curmudgeon's c6 inherited code-analysis is verified correct. Mark EXP-431 and EXP-432 complete in expansion-tracker.json. A separate open issue for tinker (pipeline gap: poller should commit raw-text/monitor.py) may be warranted if not already tracked.
